en: I actually saw an Isis in the A&P today
when I was picking up the yams. No, you didn't, Aunt Kathy.
ko: 얌을 고르고 있었을 때. 아니, 그건 아니야, 캐시 이모.

en: That was an Asian woman. I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I'm sorry. You know what? I have a question for you.
ko: 그건 아시아 여성이었어. 미안해, 미안해, 미안해. 있잖아, 질문이 있어.

en: Why is it that your friends keep antagonizing the police?
ko: 왜 네 친구들이 경찰을 괴롭히는 거야?

en: Why would you ask my boyfriend that?
ko: 왜 내 남자친구한테 그런 질문을 해?

en: Well, I'm just trying to get to know Jamal. That's very presentational. Excuse me. I don't know who. She's a guest here.
ko: 그냥 자말을 알아가고 싶어서. 그건 너무 드러내는 거야. 실례합니다. 그녀는 여기 손님이야.

en: I was wondering if after all these years you'd like to meet, to go over everything.
ko: 이렇게 오랜 시간이 지난 후에 만나서 모든 걸 이야기하고 싶었어.

en: They say that time's supposed to heal ya, but I ain't done much.
ko: 시간은 치유한다고 하지만, 나는 별로 나아지지 않았어.

en: Oh, your grandparents are here. How was the flight? Oh, it was good, good.
ko: 아, 너희 조부모님이 오셨어. 비행은 어땠어? 아, 좋았어, 좋았어.
